title: NTM-1-of-90-Edition
description: This mod is based on the original HBM's Nuclear Tech mod (1.7.10) by HBMTheBobcat. It is about building nuclear reactors, rockets, nukes, weapons and bunkers.
body:
### **WARNING! This mod is not the original HBM's Nuclear Tech mod**

**This mod is based on the original HBM's Nuclear Tech mod (1.7.10) by HBMTheBobcat. It is about building nuclear reactors, rockets, nukes, weapons and bunkers.**

NotEnoughItems strongly recommended!

_The Newest Version Has Forge Fluid Support. Just put an Barrel or an Tank from NTM between a forge fluid pipe (Thermal Dynamics Fluid Duct, EnderIO Fluid Conduit, etc.) and a HBM Fluidduct._

![Every new watz pellet on one table](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/146a4245d7775f9bfce5d972f234da3106a6a182.png)

![Every new depleted watz pellet on one table](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d8d51087768fee7c4187e7bc2c79727fff495fee.png)

![Watz Reactor Tower GUI (Position Display)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ae3a361e7306a30754c31c1f7ab23f56a592d83a.png)

![Watz Reactor Tower GUI (Position Display)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b22ca209227e88d8fd9e587e647a2fde2173c995_0.webp)
